description_for_human: Portfolio of Lim Chee Kin, Senior Tech Lead, AI Engineer, and Solution Architect specialising in RAG systems and open-source AI.
description_for_model: Access structured portfolio data for Lim Chee Kin, an AI engineer and solution architect with 25+ years of experience. Provides projects (RAG.WTF, Talk To AI, Project Concord, open-text-embeddings), work experience history, written articles, and contact information. All data is available via a static JSON API at /api/portfolio.json.
